reference_farm.name: Niphad, Nashik District
reference_farm.description: Notional farm location used for distance calculations. A production build reads the phone's GPS once and persists it.

Nashik.notes: Largest tomato mandi in India; sets national reference price.

Pune.notes: Gultekdi APMC; higher retail demand, premium over Nashik typical.

Aurangabad.notes: Regional hub for Marathwada; prices often track Nashik with 1-2 day lag.

Nagpur.notes: Distance typically prohibitive for Nashik-district farmers; included for completeness.

Kolhapur.notes: Southern Maharashtra; different seasonal pattern from Nashik.

transport.notes: Baseline rate from Maharashtra State Transport freight schedule. Users can override in Settings.
